economic_notes: Band owns 1,035 of 4,004,150 limited partnership units in Gwich'in Investments Limited Partnership (GILP), which holds a 13.34% investment in Denendeh Investments Limited Partnership. Interest recorded using modified equity method.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2023 (not 2024 — auditors' report dated April 17, 2024 but statements are for year ended March 31, 2023). Nation is located in Tsiigehtchic, Northwest Territories. Accumulated deficit of $275,641. Net debt position of $397,155. Significant due-to-related-party balance of $879,788 owed to Tsiigehtchic Charter Community, unsecured and non-interest bearing with no set repayment terms — represents a material liquidity risk. No tangible capital asset net book value disclosed on face of statements; amortization of $12,503 recorded. Accounts receivable net of $106,428 allowance for doubtful accounts. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. expenses_administration includes General Operations ($136,745) and Interim Band Manager ($13,615). expenses_social assigned to Covid Funds ($17,389). expenses_infrastructure assigned to Wellness Camp Restoration ($5,588). Summer Students Program ($55,304) assigned to expenses_salaries_total. Climate Change ($32,504) and Tourist Centre ($3,097) not mapped to standard categories.
